title: deer-flow.council.session v1
description: Unified council lifecycle event — single stream for consumers that want all council events without subscribing to council.started + council.completed separately. Carries started, member_speaking, member_voted, and completed events on the same channel. Does not replace council.started / council.completed (those remain for dedicated consumers). Source: /deer-flow/council.

topic.description: The question or decision topic put to the council

status.description: Overall council status at the time of this event

members.description: Model/agent identifiers for all council members — present on event=started

current_speaker.description: Agent name currently speaking or just voted

vote_count.description: Number of members that have submitted verdicts so far

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when the council was dispatched

completed_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when all agents finished; present only on event=completed
